name: agentgauge
install_doc: npx agentgauge OR npm install -g agentgauge && agentgauge --help
notes: Read-only diagnostic CLI (no proxy, no hook, no MCP). Reads local Claude Code session logs (~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl) and attributes tokens to 8 buckets: system_prompt, tool_definitions, tool_results, history, user_input, assistant_output, cache_read, cache_write. Runs 6 built-in waste detectors (D0–D5): compressible noise in tool output, unused loaded tool definitions, cache-prefix breaks, repeated tool results, oversized tool results, old compactable history. Outputs terminal/HTML/JSON reports with cost and savings estimates. Does NOT compress or modify anything — pure observability. Cache-neutral (no request-layer changes). Targets Claude Code only in v0.1; Codex parser planned for v0.2. Novel: sidechain vs orchestrator split (sub-agent Task turns broken out), detector D2 explicitly surfaces cache-prefix instability. Positioned as free funnel for synrouter.ai which does the actual request-layer compression.
